message:
fix(quickjs): handle var_ref double-free and remove debug code

- Add ref_count == 0 check in free_var_ref to handle double-free
  gracefully (fixes GC assertion crash at exit)
- Remove assert(var_ref->header.ref_count > 0) which crashes on
  frozen closure cleanup
- Clean up debug logging and counters from native shapes code

Performance: TSC compiles in ~4s (vs >165s without optimization = 40x speedup)
